text:
are a line of plastic models developed by Bandai Shokugan that was first released in February 2021. EVA-FRAME line of models are individually boxed candy toys bought in cases of 8 or 10, depending on the series. There are three types of box: EVA frame, EVA armor and option part. The EVA-FRAME box only contains the internal structure of the Evangelion unit and requires the EVA armor set to cover the frame. Each case also includes two types of option parts which vary greatly in contents but generally include weapons or stands for the Evangelion units. These weapons are themed on the Evangelion units included in their series. 

EVA-FRAME models are very simple and inexpensive, consisting of only a handful of parts molded in two or three colors. The designs are not screen acurate, having more panel lines and different ways to incorporate elements into the figure. These kits make extensive use of pre-painted parts and stickers in order to replicate the smaller color applications, such as the units eyes. The target age is 15 years old or older.

Each case includes one of each frame, armor set and option set and each box within the case comes with a piece of Bandai cola flavored chewing gum.
